description_for_human: View and act on your Microsoft 365 approval requests, right from Copilot chat.
description_for_model: Plugin for viewing and acting on the signed-in user's Microsoft 365 approval requests from the Approvals app. Supports listing pending, completed, canceled, and created approvals with the requester, status, and details for each; approving, rejecting, or re-assigning a request; and emailing the requester for more information. Use this plugin when the user asks about their approvals or pending requests, wants to see what is awaiting their sign-off, or wants to approve, reject, or otherwise act on an approval.
